.The measurements were made on the isomer cobalt-60-m
.In the evaluation was assumed that the cross-section
ratios for the production of the 10.4 min and 5.2 year
states are the same for thermal and resonance neutrons
and thus a total RI of 55.2+-4.5 barns was obtained.
.If one includes the 1/v part one gets 72.3+-5.0 barns.
This value compares well with the result 75+-5 barns
by Johnston et al., J.Nucl.Energy, 11(1960)95 and the
73+-5 barns by Eastwood et al., Chalk river report
